title: buildah-image: add validation to 'format'
body:
Same as #589.

Duplicate function name `TestTemplateOutputInvalidFormat` was modified in #604.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM overall, looks like you need to tweak the name of the test function to make the tests happy.
